title: Posting Update on Column Values

posts.author: Bobby.Trick (Bobby Trick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently we can write an update directly from a status or Label column by hitting the little flag in the top right corner of the cell.

I would like to have the same function for other columns such as dates, or links.

This way it would be easier for a user to indicate WHY a date is being changed and remove any friction from them providing the update.

Additionally, we have a column that links to an adobe proofing document. Currently the designer replaces the link with one to the new proof. Them they go into updates to notify everyone of the new proof. Being able to update from the cell would link the update to the new cell value. providing for a clearer understanding of the history on the item.
